title: Shri Ambe Mata Ki Aarti
intro: Read Shri Ambe Mata Ki Aarti in Hindi and seek the divine blessings of Goddess Ambe.
description:
Ambe tu hai Jagdambe Kali,
Jai Durge khappar wali,
Tere hi gun gaavein Bharati,
O maiya hum sab utaare teri aarti॥
॥ O maiya hum sab utaare teri aarti ॥

Tere bhakt jano par Mata bheer padi hai bhaari,
Danav dal par toot pado maa karke singh savari.
Sau-sau siho se balshali, hai asht bhujaon wali,
Dushto ko tu hi lalkarti, O maiya hum sab utaare teri aarti॥
॥ O maiya hum sab utaare teri aarti ॥

Maa-bete ka hai is jag mein bada hi nirmal naata,
Poot-kapoot sune hai par na mata suni kumata.
Sab pe karuna darshane wali, amrit barsane wali,
Dukhiyon ke dukhde nivarti, O maiya hum sab utaare teri aarti॥
॥ O maiya hum sab utaare teri aarti ॥

Nahi mangte dhan aur daulat, na chandi na sona,
Hum toh maange tere charno mein chhota sa kona.
Sabki bigdi banane wali, laaj bachane wali,
Satiyon ke sat ko sanvarti, O maiya hum sab utaare teri aarti॥
॥ O maiya hum sab utaare teri aarti ॥

Charan sharan mein khade tumhari, le puja ki thali,
Varad hast sar par rakh do maa sankat harne wali.
Maa bhar do bhakti ras pyali, asht bhujaon wali,
Bhakton ke kaaraj tu hi sanvarti, O maiya hum sab utaare teri aarti॥
॥ O maiya hum sab utaare teri aarti ॥

faq.q1: What is the significance of Ambe Maa's Aarti?
faq.a1: It is performed for invoking strength, courage, and destruction of negativity.
faq.q2: Which is the most auspicious day for Her?
faq.q3: What offerings (Prasad) are preferred for the Mother during Aarti?
faq.q4: Can Ambe Maa's Aarti be performed at home?
faq.a4: Yes, it can be performed in front of her idol in the home temple.
faq.q5: What should be done after the Aarti?
